title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin reports on a mixed-provider LLM benchmark comparing planning and implementation roles across Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6. He built a benchmark matrix in Archon to systematically test four workflow variants against three real GitHub issues, scoring each on seven code-quality dimensions using Opus as evaluator.
